note: Public registry of repositories whose skills conform to SkillSpec. To be listed, PR an entry here; CI re-runs `skillspec-check <your repo> --min-level <level>` to confirm the claimed level. See conformance/REGISTRY.md.

repos.name: pm-claude-skills
repos.note: Reference implementation — every skill gates at L3 in CI (SkillCheck + the published skillspec validator).
